title: Analysis of Jobs in Time Period
excerpt:

posts.author: streety (James Street)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been asked by my manager how to show how many jobs from a status column have been opened during a time period.

We have the column ‘Start date’ and ‘Departments’ in a status column. Is there a way to set a time period in a dashboard or view to show how many of that status have been created?

We are on the pro plan, so don’t have access to the ‘Performance Insights’ or ‘Pivot Board’.
